add_subdirectory(upstream/brotli)
set(BROTLIDEC_INCLUDE_DIRS ${BROTLI_INCLUDE_DIRS})
set(BROTLIENC_INCLUDE_DIRS ${BROTLI_INCLUDE_DIRS})
set(BROTLIDEC_LIBRARIES brotlidec-static brotlicommon-static)
set(BROTLIENC_LIBRARIES brotlienc-static brotlicommon-static)
if (MSVC)
    target_compile_options(brotlienc-static PRIVATE /wd4018)
    target_compile_options(brotli PRIVATE /wd4996)
endif()

option(BUILD_SHARED_LIBS "Build shared libraries" OFF)
set(CANONICAL_PREFIXES ON)
add_subdirectory(upstream)
target_include_directories(woff2dec PUBLIC upstream/include)
if (MSVC)
    target_compile_options(woff2dec PRIVATE /wd4267)
    target_compile_options(woff2dec PRIVATE /wd4477)
    target_compile_options(woff2enc PRIVATE /wd4267)
    target_compile_options(woff2enc PRIVATE /wd4018)
    target_compile_options(woff2enc PRIVATE /wd4244)
    target_compile_options(woff2enc PRIVATE /wd4018)
    target_compile_options(woff2_info PRIVATE /wd4018)
endif()
